home.h2: A service designed for those who appreciate taste.
home.h2sub: From breakfast to sunset service: a clear, refined and ready-to-serve selection.

home.b2d: Fresh products, vegetarian and alcohol-free options. Neat presentation and smooth service.

gallery.lead: Platters, presentation, sea views and onboard moments — our gallery is coming soon.

faq.lead: Everything you need to know before ordering.
faq.q1: Are delivery fees included in the prices?
faq.a1: Yes. All displayed prices are all-inclusive. No additional fees are added to your order.
faq.a2: After your order is confirmed, we arrange a time slot by message. We deliver directly to your berth — no need to move from the boat.
faq.a3: Yes. Contact us via the Contact page or WhatsApp with your dietary needs. We confirm what's possible before delivery.
faq.q4: Is there a minimum order amount?
faq.a4: No. There is no minimum order. You can order a single item or a full platter.
faq.q5: How far in advance should I order?
faq.a5: Ideally the day before or before 10am on the day of delivery. For urgent orders, contact us on WhatsApp — we do our best based on availability.
faq.q6: What happens in bad weather or if access to the port is impossible?
faq.a6: If weather conditions or port access prevent delivery, we contact you immediately to postpone or cancel at no charge.
faq.q7: Do you offer vegetarian or gluten-free options?
faq.a7: Several menu items are vegetarian. For gluten-free or vegan requests, contact us and we'll advise on available options.
faq.q8: How can I modify or cancel my order?
faq.a8: Any changes or cancellations must be communicated at least 2 hours before the confirmed time slot via WhatsApp or email.
